name: ghostrun-cli
description: Browser automation + API testing + load testing in one tool. Record flows, test REST APIs, run VU-based load tests, export to k6. Entirely local.

scripts.build: npx esbuild ghostrun.ts --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=ghostrun.js --bundle --external:playwright --external:better-sqlite3 --external:chalk --external:uuid --external:@anthropic-ai/sdk --external:@clack/prompts && npx esbuild mcp-server.ts --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=mcp-server.js --bundle --external:playwright --external:better-sqlite3 --external:uuid --external:@anthropic-ai/sdk --external:@modelcontextprotocol/sdk
